high_priority_findings.finding: EXIT_PROACTIVE_CLOSE_PRIORITY was falsely tracked as TRACKED_PENDING_IMPLEMENTATION. The Exit agent prompt at prompts.py:985-994 already contains the full proactive close rule. Rule covers: (1) hold<2h + dist<30% of range + non-trending → CLOSE; (2) hold<2h + dist<15% ANY regime → CLOSE; (3) regime shift to illiquid/ranging/unknown + hold<4h + losing → CLOSE. This is the second consecutive run correcting a false-pending finding.
